summary: Frontend testing complete for VetBones Expo React Native app. All major features working correctly after expo server restart. Initial testing showed region count as 5 instead of 11 due to caching - resolved after expo restart.

issues: Back button lacks data-testid attribute for automated testing

esqueleto_axial_subdivisions.cabeza_y_cuello: PASS - 4 vistas (Lateral, Dorsal, Ventral, Nucal), 12 huesos

study_mode.view_study_mode: PASS - Cabeza y Cuello Lateral study mode works with markers and bone list
study_mode.region_study_mode: PASS - Encuentro y Espalda study mode works with markers and bone list

exam_mode.view_exam_mode: PASS - Cabeza y Cuello Lateral exam shows questions with 4 options
exam_mode.region_exam_mode: PASS - Columna Vertebral exam shows questions with answer options

images.all_images_load: PASS - All region and view images load correctly

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend testing skipped per request

seed_data_creation: None - fully offline app with bundled data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 features from the test request have been verified. The app is a React Native Expo web app with file-based routing. Key routes: / (home), /divisions/horse, /subdivisions/horse/axial, /subdivisions/horse/apendicular, /views/horse/axial/cabeza_cuello, /study-view/horse/axial/cabeza_cuello/lateral, /exam-view/horse/axial/cabeza_cuello/lateral, /study/horse/apendicular/encuentro. Hot reload is enabled via expo supervisor process.
note: Initial test showed region count as 5 instead of 11 due to bundled cache. After 'sudo supervisorctl restart expo', the correct count of 11 regions displayed. This was a transient caching issue, not a code bug.
